detail: Live smoke against https://api.fufire.space (Railway service FuFire, deployment SUCCESS commit 819a86e, real prod API key): /v1/calculate/bazi 2xx carries quality_flags.ephemeris_mode=SWIEPH, provenance.ephemeris_id=swieph_sepl18, no house_system_fallback; /v1/calculate/tst carries no quality_flags and real provenance; /health healthy.

Live smoke: provenance.tzdb_version_id=2026.2 (never unknown). PII scrub verified live: DST-gap 422 on /v1/calculate/bazi/dayun (the pre-deploy leaking route) and /v1/calculate/bazi contain no raw birth instant, no tz name, no round-trip instant; format-error and unknown-tz 422 bodies echo no caller input.
